indexes.name: finance_audit_evidence_pkey

constraints.name: finance_idempotency_completed_result_check
constraints.def: CHECK (((execution_status <> 'COMPLETED'::text) OR ((result_entity_type IS NOT NULL) AND (result_entity_id IS NOT NULL))))
